# Redirecting to 727a8.com
> Free educational resource at 727a8.org.

## About
727a8.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Redirecting to 727a8.com: https://727a8.org/
- Section 727(a)(8) FAQ - Chapter 7 Discharge Waiting Period: https://727a8.org/frequently-asked-questions.html
- Privacy Policy: https://727a8.org/privacy.html

## Contact
- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org
- Email: contact@openbankruptcyproject.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/openbankruptcyproject

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
